records.ety: [L. protectus, p. p. of protegere, literally, to cover in front; pro before + tegere to cover. See Tegument.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Protected; p. pr. & vb. n. Protecting.]

defs: To cover or shield from danger or injury; to defend; to guard; to preserve in safety; as, a father protects his children.
quotes: The gods of Greece protect you!
